name: JoAi: List Services

description.en: View all services and hourly rates in your team catalog with names, prices and durations.
description.de: Alle Dienstleistungen und Stundensätze im Team-Katalog mit Namen, Preisen und Dauern anzeigen.

bot: Use this when the user wants to see their available services, hourly rates, or billable services that can be used for invoices.
